'''fachocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oscillation|oscillation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ch-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oscillation|oscillation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fachocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæchecheth|fæchecheth]] || [[word:fæchechej|fæchechej]] || [[word:fæchechesh|fæchechesh]] || [[word:fæcheche|fæcheche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fachochochoth|fachochochoth]] || [[word:fachochochoj|fachochochoj]] || [[word:fachochochosh|fachochochosh]] || [[word:fachochocho|fachochocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fachochoth|fachochoth]] || [[word:fachochoj|fachochoj]] || [[word:fachochosh|fachochosh]] || [[word:fachocho|fachocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fachofchofth|fachofchofth]] || [[word:fachofchofj|fachofchofj]] || [[word:fachofchofsh|fachofchofsh]] || [[word:fachofchof|fachofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fachochotho|fachochotho]] || [[word:fachochojo|fachochojo]] || [[word:fachochosho|fachochosho]] || [[word:fachochoko|fachochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fachochoth|fachochoth]] || [[word:fachochoj|fachochoj]] || [[word:fachochosh|fachochosh]] || [[word:fachocho|fachocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fachochothol|fachochothol]] || [[word:fachochojol|fachochojol]] || [[word:fachochoshol|fachochoshol]] || [[word:fachochokol|fachochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fachochoothotho|fachochoothotho]] || [[word:fachochoojojo|fachochoojojo]] || [[word:fachochooshosho|fachochooshosho]] || [[word:fachochooko|fachochooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fachochothon|fachochothon]] || [[word:fachochojon|fachochojon]] || [[word:fachochoshon|fachochoshon]] || [[word:fachochokon|fachochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fachochothooro|fachochothooro]] || [[word:fachochojooro|fachochojooro]] || [[word:fachochoshooro|fachochoshooro]] || [[word:fachochokooro|fachochokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|b470777}}
